name: Read Faiss DB
description: Read Vector Embeddings, from faiss db
input: It takes in a DataFrame as input

fields.name: faissIndexDir
fields.title: Path Of FAISS Index Directory
fields.description: Filesystem path to the directory containing the FAISS index files used for similarity search.

fields.name: topK
fields.title: Top K
fields.description: Number of nearest neighbor vectors to retrieve from the FAISS index for each query.

fields.name: faissIndexName
fields.title: Name Of FAISS Index
fields.description: Name of the FAISS index to load and query from the specified index directory.
